Container.Name: Sentinel-API
Container.Overview:
Sentinel's REST/WebSocket API and admin UI. Serves the data collected by Sentinel-Collector to any consuming app (Atrium, Atrium Rewind, or your own tools), and provides the admin interface for setup, Tautulli import, and database management.
Requires Sentinel-DB to be installed and running first.
On first start, an admin API key is generated automatically — check this container's logs immediately after first start to retrieve it. It will not be shown again.
Part of the LFFPicard homelab ecosystem: https://github.com/LFFPicard
Container.Requires: Requires Sentinel-DB to be running first.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port to access the Sentinel admin UI and API

Config.Name: Logs Path
Config.Description: Shared log path — same as Sentinel-Collector's logs path

Config.Name: Database URL
Config.Description: postgres://sentinel:YOUR_DB_PASSWORD@sentinel-db:5432/sentinel — replace YOUR_DB_PASSWORD with the password set in Sentinel-DB, and sentinel-db with that container's actual name or IP

Config.Name: Sentinel Port
Config.Description: Internal port — leave as default unless you know what you're doing
